name: Flujo 1 — Pipeline de Procesamiento de Órdenes PRODUCCION

nodes.name: Webhook - Recibir Orden
nodes.notes: PRODUCCION: Reemplazar por WooCommerce Trigger / Shopify Trigger / MercadoLibre Webhook segun la plataforma

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  order_number,
  customer_name,
  customer_email,
  customer_phone,
  product_id,
  quantity,
  total_amount,
  status,
  received_at,
  raw_payload
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.body.order_number }}',
  '{{ $json.body.customer_name }}',
  '{{ $json.body.customer_email }}',
  '{{ $json.body.customer_phone }}',
  p.id,
  {{ $json.body.quantity }},
  p.price * {{ $json.body.quantity }},
  'pending',
  NOW(),
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.body) }}'::jsonb
FROM products p
WHERE p.sku = '{{ $json.body.product_sku }}'
RETURNING id AS order_id, order_number, total_amount, product_id;

SELECT
  p.id AS product_id,
  p.sku,
  p.name AS product_name,
  p.price,
  p.stock AS stock_actual,
  p.stock_min,
  {{ $('Webhook - Recibir Orden').item.json.body.quantity }} AS cantidad_solicitada,
  CASE
    WHEN p.stock >= {{ $('Webhook - Recibir Orden').item.json.body.quantity }} THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS stock_disponible
FROM products p
WHERE p.sku = '{{ $('Webhook - Recibir Orden').item.json.body.product_sku }}';
